display_text: Witchbane, Cost: 0: Neutral item providing +20 Attack Speed. Active ability 'Cleanse' applies a basic dispel to any target unit, removing most debuffs. Passive 'Subjugate' causes attacks to deal additional damage equal to 4% of the target's maximum mana pool. Stats: CD: 20s, Mana Cost: 75, Radius: 300.
